rect.data-tip: MikiEngine|Top-level facade: owns Device + RenderGraph + Scene
MikiView|Viewport: camera + swapchain + input dispatch
MikiScene|High-level scene graph wrapper for SDK users
MikiPicker|GPU picking: entity ID + depth readback
MikiExporter|glTF / STEP / image / video export
C Wrapper|C89 ABI for FFI: Python / C# / Rust bindings
HeadlessDevice|No-window rendering for CI / batch / server
CloudRender|Server-side rendering + video stream output
CollabViewer|Multi-user collaborative viewing session
MultiWindow|Multiple viewports sharing one Device
miki_editor|Standalone demo editor application
Qt/Embed Adapter|Embed miki into Qt / WPF / Electron hosts
IPlugin|Abstract plugin interface: load / unload / version
PluginRegistry|Discovers, loads, and manages plugin lifecycle
PluginManifest|JSON/TOML manifest: deps, version, caps
ITranslator|Format translator interface for CAD import/export
Extension Points|IKernel / IUiBridge / RG custom passes
Industry Plugins (post-1.1)|Piping / HVAC / Electrical / Ship
Gizmo|3D translate/rotate/scale manipulator
Compass|3D orientation cube + axis indicator
SnapEngine|Grid / vertex / edge / face snapping
CommandBus|Undo/redo command pattern + event dispatch
OpHistory|Operation history stack for undo/redo
PreviewManager|Transient preview of operations before commit
SelectionOutline|GPU outline pass for selected entities
RichTextInput|In-viewport text editing with formatting
TopoEdit|Interactive topology editing (split/merge/fill)
MeshEditor|Direct mesh vertex/face manipulation
Interference|Clash detection between solid bodies
Curvature|Surface curvature analysis + color map
GeometryDiff|Visual diff between two geometry versions
SurfaceAnalysis|Zebra stripes / isophotes / reflection lines
AdaptiveGrid|Dynamic infinite grid with LOD fading
FemMeshRenderer (miki::cae)|Renders FEM element meshes with per-element type coloring (tet/hex/wedge). Supports wireframe overlay and shrink mode for element inspection.
ScalarField (miki::cae)|Maps scalar simulation results (stress, temperature, displacement magnitude) to color via transfer function. Supports log scale and custom LUT.
VectorField (miki::cae)|Renders vector results as oriented glyphs (arrows/cones). Supports magnitude-based scaling and GPU instanced rendering.
Contour (miki::cae)|Extracts and renders iso-contour lines on triangulated FEM surfaces. GPU marching-edges with configurable iso-value count.
Streamline (miki::cae)|Particle advection for flow visualization. GPU compute-based RK4 integration with adaptive step size.
Deformation (miki::cae)|Applies displacement field to mesh vertices with adjustable scale factor. Supports animated mode playback.
ResultCompare (miki::cae)|Side-by-side or overlay comparison of two FEM result sets. Supports difference field computation and threshold filtering.
AnimController (miki::cae)|Keyframe-based animation controller for CAE result playback. Manages time stepping, looping, and interpolation modes.
DraftAngle (miki::kernel)|Analyzes mold draft angles relative to pull direction. Color-maps faces by angle; identifies undercut regions for DFM validation.
WallThickness (miki::kernel)|Computes minimum wall thickness via ray-casting or sphere-fitting. Highlights thin-wall violations against user-defined threshold.
MassProps (miki::kernel)|Computes mass, volume, surface area, center of gravity, and inertia tensor for solid bodies. Supports multi-material assemblies.
Distance (miki::tools)|Measures minimum/maximum distance between two geometric entities (point/edge/face/body). GPU-accelerated BVH narrowphase.
PointCloudRenderer (miki::pointcloud)|GPU point splatting with LOD octree. Supports 100M+ points via persistent mapped buffer and eye-dome lighting.
ICP (miki::pointcloud)|Iterative Closest Point rigid alignment. GPU-accelerated kd-tree nearest neighbor with outlier rejection (trimmed ICP).
ScanToCAD (miki::pointcloud)|Fits BREP primitives (plane/cylinder/sphere/cone) to segmented point cloud regions. Uses RANSAC + least-squares refinement.
StepImporter (miki::import)|STEP AP203/AP214/AP242 translator via OCCT. Handles assemblies, PMI, colors, layers. Streaming mode for large files (>1GB).
JtImporter (miki::import)|Siemens JT format reader. Supports LOD mesh extraction, PMI, and lightweight assembly structure.
GltfPipeline (miki::import)|glTF 2.0 import/export with PBR materials, Draco compression, KHR_mesh_quantization. Bidirectional pipeline.
GPU Tessellation (miki::kernel)|Adaptive NURBS-to-triangle tessellation on GPU compute. Curvature-based refinement with watertight stitching at T-junctions.
CadScene (miki::cadscene)|CAD-aware scene graph with Body/Face/Edge hierarchy. Manages GPU buffers per-body, supports incremental updates and LOD switching.
LayerStack (miki::cadscene)|Ordered compositing layer stack. Each layer has independent render target, blend mode, and visibility. Compositor merges all layers.
ConfigManager (miki::cadscene)|Display configuration manager: wireframe, shaded, shaded+edges, X-ray, realistic. Per-viewport config with inheritance.
DisplayStyles (miki::cadscene)|Per-body/per-face visual style presets. Controls color, transparency, edge visibility, material override. Supports style sheets.
GPU HLR (miki::cad)|GPU-accelerated hidden line removal for engineering drawings. Renders visible/hidden edges with line-style differentiation (solid vs dashed).
SectionPlane (miki::cad)|Real-time cross-section cutting plane with GPU stencil-based cap fill. Supports multiple planes, intersection curve extraction.
OIT (miki::cad)|Order-Independent Transparency using weighted-blended or moment-based OIT. Handles overlapping transparent faces without sorting artifacts.
Explode (miki::cad)|Assembly explode view with automatic direction computation along assembly tree. Supports animated transitions and manual offset override.
RTAO (miki::cad)|Ray-Traced Ambient Occlusion for Tier1 backends. Uses RT pipeline for high-quality contact shadows. Falls back to SSAO on Tier2+.
PMI Renderer (miki::cad)|Renders Product Manufacturing Information (GD&T symbols, dimensions, tolerances) as 3D annotations. Supports STEP AP242 PMI data.
SketchRenderer (miki::cad)|Renders 2D sketch entities (lines, arcs, splines, constraints) with constraint solver feedback. Color-codes under/over-constrained.
DrawingProjector (miki::cad)|Projects 3D model to 2D engineering drawing views (front/top/iso). Handles hidden lines, section views, detail views.
2D Markup (miki::ui)|Annotation/redline overlay on viewport. Supports freehand, arrows, text callouts, measurement labels. Persisted as SVG layer.
IUiBridge (miki::ui)|Abstract UI bridge interface. Decouples renderer from host UI framework. Implementations for Qt, ImGui, web (WASM).
TextRenderer (miki::text)|GPU text rendering using multi-channel SDF (MSDF) atlas. Supports Unicode, CJK, rich formatting, and sub-pixel anti-aliasing.
SVG Overlay (miki::ui)|Vector overlay composited via SVG foreignObject or rasterized path. Used for dimension lines, callouts, 2D annotations.
ViewportWidgets (miki::ui)|In-viewport floating UI elements: mini toolbar, property popups, context menus. GPU-rendered with hit testing.
RayPicking v2 (miki::cad)|GPU ray-cast picking with BVH traversal. Returns entity ID, face index, UV, depth. Supports lasso/box selection via compute shader.
BooleanPreview (miki::cad)|Real-time boolean operation preview (union/subtract/intersect). Renders result as transparent overlay before kernel commit.
Scene Layer (miki::cadscene)|Full rendering pipeline layer: opaque geometry, shadows, lighting, post-processing. Primary layer for CAD model display.
Preview Layer (miki::cadscene)|Transient/ephemeral geometry preview. Used for tool previews, drag operations. Cleared each frame, no persistent state.
Overlay Layer (miki::cadscene)|Renders gizmos, compass, axes, selection outlines. Depth-tested against scene but rendered as separate pass.
Viewport Widget Layer (miki::cadscene)|Renders in-viewport floating widgets (toolbars, property editors). Screen-space, no depth interaction.
SVG Overlay Layer (miki::cadscene)|Vector SVG compositing layer for dimension lines, annotations. Resolution-independent rendering.
HUD Layer (miki::cadscene)|ImGui-based debug HUD: FPS counter, GPU stats, render graph visualizer, memory monitor. Dev-only in release builds.
Compositor (miki::cadscene)|Merges all layer render targets into final swapchain image. Handles alpha blending, tonemapping, and FXAA on composite.
Task Shader (miki::vgeo)|Tier1 task shader for meshlet dispatch. Performs per-meshlet frustum+occlusion culling before amplifying to mesh shader.
Mesh Shader (miki::vgeo)|Tier1 mesh shader replaces vertex+geometry pipeline. Outputs up to 256 verts/256 prims per workgroup. Zero index buffer.
VisBuffer (miki::vgeo)|Visibility buffer (64-bit): stores meshletID + triangleID per pixel. Deferred material eval in fullscreen pass. Eliminates overdraw.
GPU Culling (miki::vgeo)|Multi-pass GPU culling: frustum, HiZ occlusion, backface, small-triangle. Indirect dispatch chain, zero CPU readback.
ClusterDAG (miki::vgeo)|Nanite-style cluster LOD DAG. Parent/child cluster hierarchy with seamless LOD transitions. GPU-driven cut selection.
GPU Scene Submit (miki::vgeo)|Builds GPU-side draw commands from scene BVH traversal. Fills indirect draw/dispatch buffers entirely on GPU.
RadixSort (miki::vgeo)|GPU parallel radix sort for depth sorting, OIT, and particle ordering. 4-pass LSB radix, ~1B keys/sec on RTX 4090.
PersistentCompute (miki::vgeo)|Persistent compute thread model: long-running workgroups with work-stealing. Used for culling, BVH build, sort.
MeshletCompress (miki::vgeo)|Meshlet geometry compression: quantized positions (16-bit), octahedral normals (8-bit), delta-coded indices. ~60% size reduction.
ClusterStreaming (miki::vgeo)|On-demand cluster streaming from disk/network. LRU residency with feedback buffer. Supports 100M+ triangle scenes.
HybridRaster (miki::vgeo)|Software rasterizer for sub-4px triangles in compute shader. Avoids HW raster inefficiency on tiny triangles. Tier1 only.
CooperativeMatrix (miki::vgeo)|VK_KHR_cooperative_matrix for matrix-heavy compute (BVH build, skinning). 4x-16x throughput vs scalar on supported GPUs.
GPU QEM (miki::vgeo)|GPU-accelerated Quadric Error Metric mesh simplification. Parallel edge collapse with topology preservation. Used for LOD generation.
RenderGraph (miki::core)|Directed acyclic graph of render passes. Automatic resource aliasing, barrier insertion, async compute scheduling. ~50 passes typical.
Deferred PBR (miki::core)|G-buffer based PBR: albedo, normal, roughness/metallic, emission. Cook-Torrance BRDF with GGX NDF. Up to 256 lights.
VSM Shadows (miki::core)|Virtual Shadow Maps with 16K virtual resolution. Clipmap-based page allocation, GPU-driven page rendering. No shadow acne.
TAA / FSR (miki::core)|Temporal Anti-Aliasing with motion-vector reprojection + AMD FSR 2.0 upscaling. Supports 1/2 or 1/4 internal resolution.
GTAO / SSAO (miki::core)|Ground Truth Ambient Occlusion (half-res compute). Horizon-based with temporal accumulation. Fallback SSAO for Tier2+.
VRS (miki::core)|Variable Rate Shading: content-adaptive shading rate via VK_KHR_fragment_shading_rate. Reduces pixel shader cost 20-40% in periphery.
MaterialGraph (miki::core)|Node-based material graph compiled to Slang. Supports PBR, unlit, subsurface, clearcoat. Hot-reloadable at runtime.
Hot-Reload (miki::core)|Shader hot-reload via filesystem watcher. Recompiles changed .slang files, updates pipeline variants without restart. <100ms latency.
SlangCompiler (miki::core)|Slang shader compilation frontend. Manages includes, defines, entry points. Outputs SPIR-V/DXIL/GLSL/WGSL per backend.
PermutCache (miki::core)|Shader permutation cache: disk-persistent compiled shader variants keyed by (source hash + define set). Avoids redundant recompilation.
Forward PBR (miki::core)|Single-pass forward PBR for transparent objects and simple scenes. Clustered light culling, max 64 lights per cluster.
IBL / Env (miki::core)|Image-Based Lighting: prefiltered environment cubemap + split-sum BRDF LUT. Supports HDR .exr and equirectangular input.
ToneMapping (miki::core)|HDR-to-LDR tonemapping: ACES fitted, AgX, Khronos PBR Neutral. Auto-exposure via luminance histogram (compute).
FXAA/MSAA (miki::core)|FXAA 3.11 as lightweight post-process AA. MSAA 4x/8x for Tier2+ where TAA unavailable. Configurable per-viewport.
BackgroundMode (miki::core)|Viewport background: solid color, gradient, environment map, transparent (for compositing). Per-viewport setting.
MotionVectors (miki::core)|Per-pixel motion vectors from current/previous frame transforms. Used by TAA, motion blur, frame interpolation.
ImGuiBackend (miki::core)|Dear ImGui rendering backend using miki RHI. Supports all 5 backends. Used for debug UI and HUD overlay.
EventRecorder (miki::core)|GPU event recorder for RenderDoc-style frame capture annotation. Inserts debug labels/regions for profiling tools.
DLSS (miki::core, optional)|NVIDIA DLSS 3.5 integration for Tier1 Vulkan/D3D12. Temporal upscaling + frame generation. Requires RTX GPU.
ReSTIR / DDGI (miki::core, v1.1)|ReSTIR DI for many-light sampling + DDGI for real-time global illumination. Tier1 RT-capable GPUs. Post-1.0 feature.
ECS (miki::scene)|Archetype-based Entity Component System. Cache-friendly SOA layout, parallel system scheduling. Supports 1M+ entities at 60fps.
SpatialIndex (miki::scene)|GPU-friendly BVH for scene queries: frustum culling, ray casting, nearest neighbor. LBVH build on GPU compute.
Octree (miki::scene)|Sparse octree for point cloud LOD and spatial queries. Supports streaming insertion and GPU-parallel traversal.
RTE (miki::scene)|Relative-To-Eye rendering for large-coordinate scenes (>10km). Double-precision CPU, single-precision GPU with origin rebasing.
EventSystem (miki::scene)|Pub/sub event bus for scene changes. Typed events with priority queuing. Used for dirty-flag propagation and UI sync.
IKernel (miki::kernel)|Abstract geometric kernel interface. Decouples renderer from OCCT/Parasolid. Provides tesselate/query/boolean operations.
IGpuGeometry (miki::kernel)|GPU geometry buffer interface. Abstracts vertex/index/meshlet buffer management. Handles format conversion and upload.
OcctKernel (miki::kernel)|OpenCASCADE kernel implementation. Wraps TopoDS_Shape operations: boolean, fillet, chamfer, tessellation.
SimKernel (miki::kernel)|Simulation kernel adapter for FEA mesh and result access. Wraps solver-specific data structures into uniform interface.
TopoGraph (miki::topo)|Topology adjacency graph: vertex-edge-face-body connectivity. Enables topology-aware selection and propagation queries.
MeshTopoMap (miki::topo)|Maps tessellated mesh elements back to BREP topology (which face owns which triangles). Critical for picking and highlighting.
ResourceHandle (miki::resource)|Type-safe opaque handle (32-bit generation + 32-bit index). Dangling access returns error, never crashes. SlotMap-backed.
BindlessManager (miki::resource)|Manages global bindless descriptor array. All textures/buffers accessible via index. No descriptor set switching overhead.
DescriptorBuffer (miki::resource)|VK_EXT_descriptor_buffer implementation. Stores descriptors in GPU buffer for bindless access. Tier1 fast path.
BDAPointer (miki::resource)|Buffer Device Address pointer wrapper. Type-safe GPU pointer arithmetic for buffer references in shaders.
SlotMap (miki::resource)|Generational slot map: O(1) insert/remove/lookup with ABA protection. Backing store for ResourceHandle system.
StagingRing (miki::resource)|Ring buffer for CPU-to-GPU staging uploads. Triple-buffered, fence-tracked. Handles texture and buffer uploads without stalls.
ChunkLoader (miki::resource)|Async streaming chunk loader. Loads geometry/texture chunks on background thread, signals GPU upload when ready.
MemBudget (miki::resource)|GPU memory budget tracker via VK_EXT_memory_budget. Triggers eviction when approaching VRAM limit. Per-heap accounting.
ResidencyFeedback (miki::resource)|GPU feedback buffer indicating which resources were accessed. Drives streaming decisions for virtual textures and cluster LOD.
LRU / Defrag (miki::resource)|LRU eviction policy for resident resources + periodic memory defragmentation via copy-and-compact. Reduces fragmentation <5%.
IDevice (miki::rhi)|Abstract GPU device interface. 5 implementations (Vulkan, D3D12, WebGPU, OpenGL, Mock). Owns queues, memory, pipeline cache.
ICommandBuffer (miki::rhi)|Abstract command buffer. Supports graphics, compute, transfer. Tier-aware: mesh shaders on Tier1, vertex-only on Tier2+.
ExternalContext (miki::rhi)|Wraps externally-created GPU context (e.g., host app's VkDevice). Enables embedding without device ownership conflict.
OffscreenTarget (miki::rhi)|Render-to-texture target for headless rendering, thumbnails, shadow maps. Manages framebuffer and resolve attachments.
FrameManager (miki::rhi)|Triple-buffered frame lifecycle: acquire, record, submit, present. Manages per-frame fences, semaphores, and resource recycling.
StagingUploader (miki::rhi)|Low-level staging buffer upload manager. Batches small uploads, handles alignment, signals completion via timeline semaphore.
IPipelineFactory (miki::rhi)|Abstract pipeline creation. MainPipelineFactory (task/mesh, Tier1) vs CompatPipelineFactory (vertex+MDI, Tier2/3/4).
GpuCapabilityProfile (miki::rhi)|Queries GPU capabilities at init. Determines tier (1-4), optional features (RT, mesh shaders, BDA), and limits.
RhiTypes (miki::rhi)|Common RHI type definitions: Format, TextureUsage, BufferUsage, ShaderStage, PrimitiveTopology, etc. Backend-agnostic enums.
ErrorCode (miki)|Strongly-typed error codes with category. Supports std::error_code interop. Used throughout for non-exception error reporting.
Result<T> (miki)|std::expected<T, ErrorCode> alias. Monadic .and_then/.transform. No exceptions on hot paths.
Math Types (miki::math)|SIMD-optimized vec2/3/4, mat3/4, quat, AABB, OBB, Plane, Ray, Frustum. GLM-compatible layout, constexpr where possible.
GFX Types (miki::gfx)|Graphics primitive types: Color, Viewport, Scissor, ClearValue, Extent2D/3D. Shared across all layers.
Coca Runtime (miki::coca)|Coroutine-based async runtime. Task scheduler with thread pool, co_await for async I/O, GPU fence waiting, file loading.
CpuProfiler (miki::debug)|CPU profiling with chrome://tracing JSON export. Scoped zones, thread-aware, <10ns overhead per zone enter/exit.
GpuProfiler (miki::debug)|GPU timestamp query profiler. Per-pass timing with pipeline statistics. Supports RenderDoc/Nsight integration markers.
MemProfiler (miki::debug)|Memory allocation tracker: per-category byte counts, peak tracking, leak detection. Hooks into GPU and CPU allocators.
StructuredLogger (miki::debug)|JSON-structured logging with severity, category, source location. Async file writer + optional network sink for remote monitoring.
Telemetry (miki::debug)|Runtime telemetry: frame time histogram, GPU utilization, memory pressure, draw call counts. Feeds into HUD and external dashboards.
Breadcrumbs (miki::debug)|GPU crash breadcrumb system via VK_AMD_buffer_marker / NV_device_diagnostic_checkpoints. Identifies last completed GPU operation before TDR.
